accepted_scope: Reducing discovery: current API matrix, two context-taking public inline forms, existing Scope.run deps behavior, primitive and extension context boundaries, and explicit cleanup params.

human_owned_target_contract.evidence: User required every dependency declared, no ctx or scope arguments, explicit params, and the same deps form for ctx.exec as scope.run.
human_owned_target_contract.signature_boundary: name, deps, and params required; fn receives inferred deps and params; deps {} and params [] cover the empty form.

implementation_unknowns: extension target identity and ExecTargetFn migration
exact AST migration count and deterministic contract checker
downstream_authority: Fund PKR-A1 implementation and its checker; completion remains independently gated.
